prerequisites.value: Ability to start a performance (or raging song ) as a move action, bardic performance or raging song class feature.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you start a performance (or a raging song ) as a move or swift action, you can use a standard action to demoralize a foe, attempting a Perform check appropriate to your performance in place of the Intimidate check. Your performance must be one with an audible component. If you can start a performance as a swift action and you have the Dazzling Display feat, you can gain the benefit of Dazzling Display by succeeding at a Perform check in place of an Intimidate check.
